reviews.review_description: This is an ideal tour for those who'd like to see many Bethlehem historical sites coupled with interesting facts but lack the ability to get there. It's much cheaper than traveling there in person as well. There are so many locations to see, and I enjoy that the map is shown indicating the distance between each location.

reviews.review_title: Bethlehem Tour without all the walking
reviews.review_description: This simple virtual tour of modern-day Bethlehem is a beautiful blend of past and present. You’ll stroll the ancient streets where Jesus was born and the tour weaves scripture, history, and real-world locations together in a way that’s both educational and insightful.
